title: STORAGE.md frontmatter — agentstorage/v1 (filesystem policy block)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter portion of an AIP-35 STORAGE.md manifest, OR the inline form embedded in any other manifest's `storage:` block. Filesystem-only — sandbox-shaped backends (e2b/modal/...) live in AIP-36 SANDBOX.md.

schema.description: Standalone-only. Identifies the doctype + version. Absent when the block is inlined in another manifest.

version.description: Standalone-only. Spec version of THIS file. Bump on breaking shape change.

provider.description: Backend kind. Day-1 enumerated set: cloud-bucket | self-bucket | github | local-fs | dev-local | mastra-s3 | mastra-azure. Hosts MAY register additional ids; the schema accepts any non-empty string and host-side validation narrows.

config.description: Provider-specific connection fields. Shape varies per provider (see AIP-35 §Provider config shapes).

sync.description: Sync semantics. Lifecycle triggers reference AIP-37 event names.

auth.description: Reference to AIP-19 SECRETS.md (or future ENV.md) for credentials.

identity.description: AIP-23 identity-ref block — commit author(s) for syncing providers (github). Supports multi-attribution (primary + co-authors).

policy.description: AIP-38 POLICY block — access grants on storage actions.

exclude.description: Paths NOT mirrored to the backing store. Glob-ish, prefix-matched.

read_only.description: Reject writes at the storage layer.

metadata.description: Free-form, namespaced. Authors MAY stash adapter-specific hints under namespaced keys.

on.description: AIP-37 lifecycle event name. Standard: workspace-open | turn-start | manual. Aliases (per-turn, each-write) resolve via AIP-37.

ttl_seconds.description: Cache validity for pull-push providers (e.g. github clone).

on.description: AIP-37 event name. Common: each-write | per-turn | per-conversation | manual.

batch_window_ms.description: Debounce window for each-write commit mode.

message_template.description: Template for commit message. Provider-specific tokens (e.g. {{operator}}, {{summary}}).

on.description: AIP-37 event name. Common: per-commit | per-turn | per-conversation | manual.

pr_policy.description: Github only. Whether to open PRs automatically.

ref.description: Path or registry slug pointing to a SECRETS.md (or future ENV.md) inventory.

env.description: Env-var names this consumer expects to be revealed from the referenced inventory.

identityRefBlock.description: AIP-23 §'Identity reference block'. Single entry or array (multi-attribution).
